subject: grx009_luminance_rurix_owned_switch_recompute_reverification
purpose: Independent recompute to verify the texture_artifact_provenance_policy revert conditions before attempting the hlsl_bridge_workaround -> rurix_owned canonical switch. Pure offline (rurixc -> llc -> dxv); no GPU/MSVC/Godot rebuild; no repo file overwritten by the compile itself (all compile outputs went to an out-of-repo scratch dir).

recompute_measurements.note: Each source compiled via `rurixc <src> --target dxil -o <scratch.dxil>`; the DXIL container SHA-256 was recorded per run. All runs exit 0 and the DXC validator accepts every container. Byte LENGTH is stable; container CONTENT is NOT byte-reproducible.

lib_texture_rx.kind: texture (Texture2D<f32> SRV / RWTexture2D<f32> UAV) — the runtime-mappable candidate

lib_rx_rawbuffer.kind: raw-buffer (View/ViewMut<global,f32>) — NOT runtime-mappable to Godot Texture2D handles (binding-kind mismatch); historical fixture only
lib_rx_rawbuffer.probe_single_shot_hash: 966f10a07bb01d27c40917c29bffa0eac8075a9a91e0b4a044daec00f07c0239 (spike/dxil-path-probe/rurix_owned_feasibility/pass_direct_compile_evidence.json recorded ONE of these two states; running once it could not observe the non-determinism)

ir_text_ll_stable.measured: rurixc-emitted IR text sidecar (<out>.dxil.ll) hashed over 10 runs
ir_text_ll_stable.conclusion: rurixc front-end + DXIL IR-text emission is fully deterministic.

llc_direct_on_fixed_ll.measured: the single stable .ll above fed DIRECTLY to llc (`llc <fixed.ll> -filetype=obj -o <out>`) 12 times
llc_direct_on_fixed_ll.split: 8x 4dcc65e2..., 4x 47fb0b00... (same two states as the rurixc-driven runs)
llc_direct_on_fixed_ll.conclusion: The non-determinism is 100% inside llc's DirectX-backend DXIL container emission. Given byte-identical input IR, llc emits one of two container variants at random.

byte_diff_between_the_two_states.leading_container_hash_field_bytes_4_20: all-zero in both (unsigned container; dxv validates but the container hash field is not populated)

differing_ranges.region: module hash/digest — downstream consequence of the 3-byte content diff

policy_json_revert_to_rurix_owned_when.1_patched_llc_supports_texture_load_stor: SATISFIED (upstream dx.Texture load.level + local patch store.texture; every recompute run exit 0 + dxv accepted).

policy_md_stricter_four_conditions.2_lib_texture_status_success_AND_runtime: NOT SATISFIED — kernel is single-level-only (no pyramid cascade / EMA / prev-luminance / final WRITE_LUMINANCE gating); runtime_mappable=true additionally needs a real D3D12 dispatch on the rurix_owned container.
policy_md_stricter_four_conditions.3_dxv_accepts_AND_provenance_flips_rurix: DXV accepts; provenance flip NOT performed (blocked by 2 and by the new reproducibility blocker below).

migration_plan_per_pass_chain.2_math_parity_green_on_rurix_owned_conta: NOT done (offline-doable, but not the gating blocker).
migration_plan_per_pass_chain.3_d3d12_real_dispatch_green_on_rurix_own: NOT done — requires GPU/MSVC harness (out of scope for this offline slice) AND is ill-defined while the container is not byte-reproducible.

revert_condition_reverification.new_independent_blocker_reproducibility: The rurixc->llc->dxv container is NOT byte-reproducible (llc DXIL emission non-deterministic, 2 states). A digest-pinned canonical (src/rurix-godot include_bytes! + LUMINANCE_OFFLINE_DXIL_SHA256 constant) REQUIRES exactly one reproducible SHA-256. This alone fails the '>=8 runs hash stable' gate and independently blocks the switch. The current HLSL bridge canonical (DXC cs_6_0) IS deterministic, which is why it can be pinned.

dxil.produced_by: dxc (hlsl_bridge_workaround) — differs from BOTH rurixc states above; NOT replaced by this slice

left_to_main_session_cross_slice: src/rurix-godot LUMINANCE_DXIL include_bytes! + LUMINANCE_OFFLINE_DXIL_SHA256 digest sync (forbidden dir this slice; and no switch to sync toward while the container is non-reproducible).

registry/deferred.json RD-025 retirement — NOT triggered: texture STORE intrinsic is still a LOCAL llc patch (commit 2afad69a7), not upstreamed (issue #194930 open); the new llc non-determinism is a separate concern. No edit made (global/cross-slice file).
pass_manifest.json offline_compile_provenance flip — not performed (no switch).
real_d3d12_dispatch_smoke on a rurix_owned container — needs GPU/MSVC; also requires a byte-reproducible container to pin.
